title: Move items from one board to the next on a given day of the week
excerpt: I have a board which has multiple inputs on a daily basis all tag with the date of input.  Is there a way to set an automation to run on every Wednesday at a given time to move the items with a specific status to a new b…

posts.author: Mattieuk (Matt Hardy)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a board which has multiple inputs on a daily basis all tag with the date of input. Is there a way to set an automation to run on every Wednesday at a given time to move the items with a specific status to a new board regardless of the date they was inputted?

Thanks

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Mattieuk

You can use a sequence of automations to support this for you. First, get something in place to nominate the date and label the day of the week - we used a date column and a status column. Set up a loop of 7 automations (one for each day of the week) as below:

image1467×816 91.2 KB

Then, set up your real intention with an executive automation such as:

image915×384 55.1 KB

Hope that’s helpful!
teameasy@easy-mondays.com
